---
title: "beware_of_r-square"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| output: false
library(tidyverse)
library(easystats)
library(ggformula)

set_theme(theme_bw())

set.seed(666)
```

```{r}
N <- 10
x <- 1:N
alpha <- 20
beta <- 2
y <- alpha + beta * x + rnorm(N)
d <- tibble(x, y)
```

```{r}
gf_point(y ~ x, data = d)
```

```{r}
m0 <- lm(y ~ 1, data = d)
m1 <- lm(y ~ x, data = d)
m2 <- lm(y ~ poly(x, N-1), data = d)
```

```{r}
compare_performance(m0, m1, m2)
```

```{r}
gf_line(y_pred ~ x, data = tibble(y_pred = predict(m0), x), color = "blue")  |> gf_point(y ~ x, data = d)
```

```{r}
gf_line(y_pred ~ x, data = tibble(y_pred = predict(m1), x), color = "blue")  |> gf_point(y ~ x, data = d)
```

```{r}
gf_line(y_pred ~ x, data = tibble(y_pred = predict(m2), x), color = "blue")  |> gf_point(y ~ x, data = d)
```
